title: About ConvertBase.app
metaDescription: Learn about ConvertBase.app, a free collection of browser-based converters, calculators, generators and developer utilities.
heading: About ConvertBase.app
content: ConvertBase.app is a free collection of online tools - converters, calculators, generators, and developer utilities - built around a simple idea: the answer to an everyday question should be one click away.

The project was started in 2025 by Paweł Celiński, a Power Platform developer at Toyota Material Handling Poland. Working daily with business automation tools, Paweł kept running into the same friction: simple conversions and calculations that required either memorising formulas or juggling multiple browser tabs. ConvertBase.app is the solution he built for himself - and made available to everyone.
Every tool on this site runs entirely in your browser. No installation, no account, no fees. Your data never leaves your device.

sections.title: What you'll find on ConvertBase.app
paragraphs: Unit, currency, and file format converters.

sections.title: Have an idea?
paragraphs: Have an idea for a tool that should be here? Get in touch.
